---
name: RFC — Request for Comments
about: Propose a design decision, architecture change, or new feature for discussion
title: "[RFC] "
labels: rfc
assignees: ''

---

## Summary

A brief one-paragraph description of the proposal.

## Motivation

Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve?

## Detailed Design

A thorough description of the proposed approach, including API surface, behavior, and edge cases.

## Drawbacks

Any known downsides, trade-offs, or risks.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches were considered and why were they rejected?

## Open Questions

Any unresolved questions or areas where feedback is specifically requested.
